title: 5 High Earnings Yield Stocks to Drive Value in Your Portfolio
text: Earnings yield helps investors pick undervalued stocks that may have been overlooked by the market. LOMA, INSE, CPA, AIZ & PKOH are good choices for value investors.

title: Assurant: Growth And Sticky Rate Hikes Reduce Upside, Downgrade To Hold
text: Assurant, a global provider of risk management products and services, has risen 6.79%, since my last article, outperforming the S&P 500. The company's diversified businesses have enabled a 6.45% YoY increase in Q1 revenues, but potential recessionary pressures and increasing interest rates may dampen potential upside. Despite Assurant's strong operational position and growth potential, I rate the stock as a 'hold' due to the aforementioned concerns.
